First 12 chars of map indicate exit points
    00  01  02
    |   |   |
03--+-------+--04
    |       |
05--|       |--06
    |       |
07--+-------+--08
    |   |   |
    09  10  11

00 - 00000 - Blank
01 - 00202 - North
02 - 00404 - East
03 - 00606 - South
04 - 00808 - West
05 - 01010 - East to West
06 - 01212 - North to South
07 - 01414 - Crossroads
08 - 01616 - North T
09 - 01818 - East T
10 - 02020 - South T
11 - 02222 - West T
